items.title: ‘They will play together’ – Carlo Ancelotti makes shock Neymar announcement before Brazil’s World Cup clash with Norway
items.summary: NEYMAR is fit to play 90 minutes and will play with Vinicius Jr, Carlo Ancelotti has announced. The Brazil boss has revealed that the Santos ace will appear alongside the Real Madrid star as the South Americans continue their World Cup campaign. items.title: Is Mexico vs England on ITV or BBC? World Cup TV guide for last-16 clash
items.summary: ENGLAND face their biggest test of the World Cup yet as they take on co-hosts Mexico in the last-16 TONIGHT! items.title: Hollick wins BMW International Open as YouTube star Dalke fades
items.summary: Michael Hollick produced a sensational eagle on the final hole to win the DP World Tour's BMW International Open on Sunday, as YouTuber Brad Dalke sealed a credible top-30 finish.

items.title: England vs Mexico facing delays as fans share videos of streets being battered by biblical rainfall amid storm warning
items.summary: MEXICO CITY has been hit by huge thunderstorms just hours before the World Cup last-16 match between Mexico and England. The two sides are set to go head to head at 6pm local time (1am BST) at the Azteca Stadium. It was initially suggested that the game could be moved forward to midday local time...
